name: Mahakoht Dola
description:
The previous ruler of Imanity, as well as Steph's grandfather. His reign led to many losses for Imanity, thus many people call him a, "Foolish King." 

He is terrible at games, being unable to win a majority. However, he is able to give Imanity a chance by finding out opponent's secrets. When he was near the end of his life, he entrusted Steph with, "The Key to Imanity's Hope;" which is to be given to someone who is capable of saving Imanity.
